problem id: 5e591674
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(7) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  01000100 -> 00000001
  10011111 -> 10000010
  10001110 -> 00000010
  00100101 -> 10000000
  00001100 -> 00000000
  11010101 -> 10000011
  11000111 -> 10000011
  11111011 -> 10000011
  10010011 -> 10000010
  10100011 -> 10000010

query: 11110000
predicted answer: 00000011
